name: Moonshore (Open Fantasy)
description:
🗡Your new home...🌙
---
*You arrive to Moonshore, know for its unique people and the heart of their shipments in the country. You enter your new home, ready to explore this city.*
---
*I have mentioned Moonshore in my fantasy stories a lot, so I thought of making it a type of open world thing - I'm not sure if it'll be the best, but let's see! Please give me some info to improve! Also, if they chat for you, I sadly can't do anything about that, Im sorry!*

*If you want to talk to them separately, here you go! (I also need to update a few of them as well-)*
